name: subagent findings format validator accepts an item with all five required fields per section 2.3
command: printf '[{"severity":"P1","rule_id":"r","file":"x.js","line":10,"finding":"x","suggested_fix":"y"}]\n' > findings.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-findings.sh" --findings findings.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
